result.stdout:
usage: Motif [<flags>] <command>

Flags:
  -h,  --help                           Show context-sensitive help 
  -d,  --definition=<value>             Motif YAML definition file 
  -o,  --output=<value>                 Output folder for generated directories and files 
  -t,  --template=<value>               Motif template folder 

Commands:
  create                                Create directories and files based on the definition file 
  update                                Update directories and files based on the definition file

commands.payload:
